title: How hype and hyperbole distort the neuroscience of sex differences.
author_string: Rippon, Gina, Eliot, Lise, Genon, Sarah, Joel, Daphna
abstract: Sex/gender differences in the human brain attract attention far beyond the neuroscience community. Given the interest of nonspecialists, it is important that researchers studying human female-male brain difference assume greater responsibility for the accurate communication of their findings.
